title: Build a Text Adventure Game
description: Build an interactive text adventure game from scratch, adding Python features chapter by chapter. By the end, you'll have a game with rooms, items, combat, save/load, and classes — all using concepts from the book.
final_description: A complete text adventure game with a room map, item inventory, NPC interactions, combat system, save/load via files, and an object-oriented design with inheritance — built across 10 chapters using progressively advanced Python concepts.
